faqs.question: What pests are most common in East Elmhurst homes?
faqs.answer: East Elmhurst properties commonly experience issues with German cockroaches, mice, ants, and occasional waterbugs due to the area's older housing stock and proximity to water sources. Our general pest control service addresses all of these pests with comprehensive interior and exterior treatments tailored to Queens properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you service my East Elmhurst property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for most East Elmhurst locations. Our technicians service the entire Queens area daily, and we understand that pest problems require urgent attention. Call us before noon for potential same-day service availability.

faqs.question: What does the $175-$300 general pest control service include?
faqs.answer: Our general pest control service includes a thorough inspection, interior and exterior treatment, crack and crevice applications, entry point identification, and customized solutions based on your property size and pest pressure. Larger homes or severe infestations fall toward the higher end of the price range, while smaller apartments and preventative treatments start at $175.

faqs.question: Is your pest control treatment safe for families and pets in East Elmhurst?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and offer eco-friendly treatment options that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals.
